query: Quiero probar BAAI/bge-large-en-v1.5 en lugar del modelo multilingual default. Como lo cambio?
expected_behavior: Routes to reference/tuning-search.md for the model-swap procedure
Sets the ANTARES_MODEL env var (systemd unit Environment= or ~/.config/environment.d/)
Drops embeddings from EVERY slug's DB before reindexing — mixed dimensions give garbage results (DELETE FROM memory_chunks across all .memory-index.db)
Reindexes HOME (other slugs reindex on their next session-start)
Warns bge-large is English-only — recall on Spanish prompts degrades
Notes the TARGET_TOKENS chunk-size constant should be bumped for the model's 512-token window
notes: Guards against: changing the env var without dropping chunks (mixed-dimension corruption); dropping chunks for only one slug; and failing to warn about the multilingual-to-English language mismatch degrading Spanish recall.
